description: LLM uses parallel() to fan out file reviews and synthesize results

criteria.name: uses_parallel
criteria.description: Script uses parallel() to run multiple agents concurrently
criteria.pass_condition: Script calls parallel() with at least 3 thunks (one per file).

criteria.name: correct_parallel_syntax
criteria.pass_condition: parallel() wraps each call in () => agent(...), not promises directly.

criteria.name: within_registerPhase
criteria.description: parallel() used inside a registerPhase body
criteria.pass_condition: The parallel call is inside a registerPhase body.

criteria.name: null_filtering
criteria.description: Results filtered for null before synthesis
criteria.pass_condition: If filtering is shown, uses .filter(Boolean) on parallel results.

criteria.name: synthesis_phase
criteria.description: A synthesis phase combines parallel results
criteria.pass_condition: Script has a separate synthesis phase after the parallel review phase.

criteria.name: sensible_summary
criteria.description: The synthesis provides a coherent summary of all three files
criteria.pass_condition: Result mentions line counts, export counts, or imports for auth, billing, utils.
